title: 5 things godly men build when no one is watching
caption:
Nobody's watching.

But God is.

And the man who knows that — really knows it — builds five things in his 20s that most men skip.

Because they're invisible. They don't perform on Instagram. They don't earn you followers or compliments. They just build the man.

The scroll you haven't declared war on. The body you keep meaning to train. The prayer life you keep pushing to someday. The brothers who don't know your actual battle. The reputation you're building in rooms nobody photographs.

"Whatever you do, work at it with all your heart, as working for the Lord." — Colossians 3:23.

Build when nobody's watching. That's when character actually forms.

—

Comment 'build' and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.
